overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from a third-person perspective following a character in period clothing walking through a historic city at night. The scene transitions from clear conditions to a heavy rainstorm with lightning, featuring gas lamp lighting, wet cobblestone streets, and a horse-drawn carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic gas-lit cobblestone street with balconied buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dry cobblestone street between historic buildings with iron balconies

entered.detail: multi-story historic building with ornate iron balconies and lit windows
stone building with large arched windows and doorways on the ground floor
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
wet-looking cobblestone road with embedded tram tracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow historic street at night, flanked by balconied buildings on the left and arched commercial buildings on the right. Gas lamps cast warm light onto the cobblestone street, and the atmosphere is calm and dry.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-swept historic street with parked carriage

events.description: heavy rain begins falling, creating ripples on the cobblestone street and reducing visibility
approaching and passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the downpour, passing close to a parked horse-drawn carriage on the right while rain soaks the environment

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage with covered cabin and large wheels parked on the street

entered.detail: wooden covered carriage with large spoked wheels and a horse harnessed to the front

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain begins to fall as the character continues walking, drenching the cobblestone street. A horse-drawn carriage is parked on the right side, which the character passes closely. The gas lamps create halos in the rain, and the balconied building remains prominent on the left.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the sky and buildings ahead, followed by continued heavy rain

agents.ego_description: walking toward an open intersection as lightning strikes in the distance, leaving the carriage behind

entered.detail: open street intersection with a corner building visible on the far side
multi-story building at the street corner with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection as a lightning flash illuminates the rainy night sky. The horse-drawn carriage is now behind, and the street opens up to reveal a corner building ahead. The heavy rain continues to fall on the cobblestones as the character walks toward the junction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic city street that transforms from a calm, dry night into a heavy rainstorm. It begins with a character walking down a narrow cobblestone road flanked by balconied and arched buildings under the warm, steady glow of gas lamps. As the character continues forward, a sudden downpour drenches the environment, creating luminous halos around the lamps and slicking the stones as the camera passes a parked horse-drawn carriage. The scene then opens up toward an intersection, where a flash of lightning momentarily illuminates the dark sky and the falling rain. Finally, the camera follows the character past the carriage and toward a corner building at the junction under the persistent storm.
